purpose: Documents the drop-in slot for the pinned Mermaid bundle. tools/install-native-deps.py downloads Mermaid 11.14.0 from npm and writes package/dist/mermaid.min.js into this directory; the preview loads it from https://markdownplusplus.local/mermaid/mermaid.min.js (or via file:// in standalone HTML export). Policy: 'latest as of build, pinned per plugin release.'
exports: Convention: drop mermaid.min.js next to this README
called_by: MarkdownPlusPlus.Native/src/MarkdownRenderer.cpp (references mermaid/mermaid.min.js in both preview and standalone documents)
invariants: The file name must be exactly 'mermaid.min.js' - both MarkdownRenderer.cpp and the install script hard-code that path.
gotchas: mermaid.min.js itself is not checked into git (it is downloaded by install-native-deps.py); a fresh clone must run that script before mermaid will render.
